user.title: Configure Effy
user.description: Set up effective PV loss distribution. Select your input sources (PV, battery import, grid import) and output sinks (battery export, grid export).

data.input_sensors: Input sensors (PV, BMS import from battery/grid)

error.at_least_one_input: Please select at least one input sensor.
error.at_least_one_output: Please select at least one output sensor.
error.output_needs_device_class: Every output sensor must have a device class (power or energy) set. Please pick a different sensor or fix its device class first.
